mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.project_type, p.current_phase, p.progress_pct, p.planned_start, p.planned_end, p.status FROM project p INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = p.customer_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_name, p.progress_pct, p.status AS overall_status, pp.phase_name AS current_phase_name FROM project p LEFT JOIN project_phase pp ON pp.project_id = p.id AND pp.phase_code = p.current_phase AND pp.deleted = 0 WHERE p.id = #{projectId} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT id AS phase_id, phase_code, phase_name, status, planned_start, planned_end, actual_start, actual_end, deliverables FROM project_phase WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id AS phase_id, phase_code, phase_name, deliverables, actual_end, update_time FROM project_phase WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 AND deliverables IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(deliverables) > 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT customer_id FROM project WHERE id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT cp.id, cp.project_id, cp.plan_name, cp.cutover_date, cp.start_time, cp.end_time, cp.impact_scope, cp.emergency_contact, cp.status, cp.customer_sign_result, cp.customer_sign_time, cp.customer_sign_remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cutover_step cs WHERE cs.plan_id = cp.id AND cs.deleted = 0) AS step_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cutover_step cs WHERE cs.plan_id = cp.id AND cs.deleted = 0 AND cs.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_step_count FROM cutover_plan cp WHERE cp.deleted = 0 AND cp.customer_sign_link = #{token} AND cp.status = 'PENDING_CUSTOMER_APPROVAL' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, sort_order, step_name, description, estimated_duration, owner_name, status, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, actual_duration FROM cutover_step WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT cp.id, cp.project_id, cp.plan_name, cp.cutover_date, cp.start_time, cp.end_time, cp.impact_scope, cp.emergency_contact, cp.status, cp.customer_sign_result, cp.customer_sign_time, cp.customer_sign_remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cutover_step cs WHERE cs.plan_id = cp.id AND cs.deleted = 0) AS step_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cutover_step cs WHERE cs.plan_id = cp.id AND cs.deleted = 0 AND cs.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_step_count FROM cutover_plan cp WHERE cp.deleted = 0 AND cp.project_id = #{projectId} AND cp.status = 'PENDING_CUSTOMER_APPROVAL' ORDER BY cp.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE cutover_plan SET customer_sign_result = #{result}, customer_sign_user = #{signUser}, customer_sign_time = #{signTime}, customer_sign_remark = #{remark}, status = #{newStatus}, update_time = #{signTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING_CUSTOMER_APPROVAL'
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, name, status, apply_time, internal_audit_time, customer_sign_time, customer_sign_result, customer_sign_remark FROM acceptance_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND customer_sign_link = #{token} AND status = 'CUSTOMER_SIGNING' LIMIT 1
SELECT id, test_type, test_name, test_result, test_value, test_time, remark FROM acceptance_test_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY test_type ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, project_id, name, status, apply_time, internal_audit_time, customer_sign_time, customer_sign_result, customer_sign_remark FROM acceptance_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 'CUSTOMER_SIGNING' ORDER BY apply_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE acceptance_task SET customer_sign_result = #{result}, customer_sign_user = #{signUser}, customer_sign_time = #{signTime}, customer_sign_remark = #{remark}, status = #{newStatus}, update_time = #{signTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'CUSTOMER_SIGNING'
mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_id, message_type, business_id, project_id, title, content, is_read, create_time FROM customer_message WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY is_read ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_message WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{messageId} AND customer_id = #{customerId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE customer_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_message (id, customer_id, message_type, business_id, project_id, title, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{messageType}, #{businessId}, #{projectId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
